children.heading: .—Rebuilt in the United States
children.label: a .—Rebuilt in the United States
children.text: In this chapter, a vessel is deemed to have been rebuilt in the United States only if the entire rebuilding, including the construction of any major component of the hull or superstructure, was done in the United States.

children.heading: .—Registry endorsement
children.label: 1 .—Registry endorsement
children.text: The terms “certificate of registry”, “register”, and “registry” mean a certificate of documentation with a registry endorsement issued under this chapter.

children.heading: .—Coastwise endorsement
children.label: 2 .—Coastwise endorsement
children.text: The terms “license”, “enrollment and license”, “license for the coastwise (or coasting) trade”, and “enrollment and license for the coastwise (or coasting) trade” mean a certificate of documentation with a coastwise endorsement issued under this chapter.

children.heading: .—Yacht
children.label: 3 .—Yacht
children.text: The term “yacht” means a recreational vessel even if not documented.
